zh.Carnforth, Lancaster, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾卡福斯
zh.Helton by Penrith, Westmorland, England: 英國維斯特莫藍德希爾頓 白 利特
zh.lifeSummary: Margaret de Morville是Robert de Morville of Helton Flecket的女兒，於大約1235年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德希爾頓 白 利特。她於1265年與William of Washington結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1281年1月2日在英國英格蘭藍卡爾卡福斯享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margaret de Morville是Robert de Morville of Helton Flecket的女儿，于大约1235年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德希爾頓 白 利特。她于1265年与William of Washington结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于1281年1月2日在英国英格兰藍卡爾卡福斯享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Morville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Moorfield
meanings: English: locative name from Morville (Shrops), which is recorded as Mamerfeld in the 12th century, Momerefeld in 1255, and Morfelde in 1464.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Margaret de Morville was born about 1235, in Helton by Penrith, Westmorland, England as the daughter of Robert de Morville of Helton Flecket. She married William of Washington in 1265. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died on 2 January 1281, in Carnforth, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret de Morville est née environ 1235, à Helton by Penrith, Westmorland, Angleterre, fille de Robert de Morville of Helton Flecket. Elle a épousé William of Washington en 1265. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée le 2 janvier 1281, à Carnforth, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret de Morville wurde um 1235 in Helton by Penrith, Westmorland, England, als Tochter von Robert de Morville of Helton Flecket geboren. Sie hat 1265 William of Washington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb am 2. Januar 1281 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Carnforth, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret de Morville è nata il circa 1235 nel Helton by Penrith, Westmorland, England come figlia di Robert de Morville of Helton Flecket. Lei sposato William of Washington nel 1265. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì il 2 gennaio 1281, nel Carnforth, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.Helton by Penrith, Westmorland, England: イギリスウエストモーランドヘルトン ビー ペンリス
ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Morvilleは約1235年にイギリスウエストモーランドヘルトン ビー ペンリスでRobert de Morville of Helton Flecketの娘として生まれた。1265年にWilliam of Washingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は1281年1月2日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアカーンフォースで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Morville(은)는 대략 1235년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 헬턴 비 펜리스에서 Robert de Morville of Helton Flecket의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1265년 William of Washington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1281년 1월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 카른포스에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Carnforth, Lancaster, England: Carnforth, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Margaret de Morville nasceu aproximadamente 1235, em Helton by Penrith, Westmorland, Inglaterra filha de Robert de Morville of Helton Flecket. Ela casou-se com William of Washington em 1265. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ela faleceu em 2 de janeiro de 1281, em Carnforth, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret de Morville родилась около 1235 г. в местности хелтон би пенрит, вестморланд, Англия. Её отца звали Robert de Morville of Helton Flecket. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William of Washington в 1265 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла 2 января 1281 г. в местности карнфорт, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Margaret de Morville nació aproximadamente 1235, en Helton by Penrith, Westmorland, Inglaterra como hija de Robert de Morville of Helton Flecket. Se casó con William of Washington en 1265. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió el 2 de enero de 1281, en Carnforth, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 47 años.
